summary: Created learning-logger skill for zoputer to log learnings from client interactions. Provides CLI with --learning, --source, --category args, dry-run mode, and list functionality. Commits to zoputer/learnings branch and respects autonomy config permissions.

integration_notes.autonomy_config: Reads from N5/config/zoputer_autonomy.yaml (falls back to allowing Learnings/ if not found)
integration_notes.git_substrate: Uses same patterns as git-substrate-sync (D1.2) for commit/push operations
integration_notes.branch_strategy: Pushes to zoputer/learnings branch, not main - requires D4.3 for review notification
integration_notes.local_copy: Also creates local copy in Learnings/ for reference

notes: Autonomy config (D4.1) not yet deployed so using default fallback allowing Learnings/. Git push to zoputer-substrate repo requires repo to exist on GitHub. Script handles missing config gracefully and provides clear dry-run output for testing.
learnings: Fallback permissions needed when autonomy config doesn't exist yet (graceful degradation)
Local copy of learnings useful for quick reference without pulling from Git
